title: Raya 16x (Java Port)
description: A port of the Raya 16x pack to Java Edition, originally made by PrestigePlayzMC for MCBE
body:
# Raya 16x - Java Port A port of the Raya 16x texture pack from Bedrock Edition to Java Edition
Are you Malaysian? Whether you are or not, a festival after Ramadan also known (at least in Malaysia) as Hari Raya! So this pack is themed on it with a yellowish-green pallete.
If you're only interested in the GUI, check out [this page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/raya-16x-gui)! --- **Available Versions / Versi Tersedia**
| Minecraft Versions | Available? | | :------------------ | :------------: | | 1.21 (Tricky Trials Update)
1.20 (Trails & Tales Update) | ✔️ | | 1.19.3-1.19.4 (Wild Update) | ✔️ | | 1.19-1.19.2 (Wild Update)
1.18 (Cave & Cliffs Update - Part II)
1.17 (Caves & Cliffs Update - Part I)
1.16 (Nether Update)
1.15 (Buzzy Bees Update)
1.14 (Village & Pillage Update) | ✔️ | | 1.13 (Update Aquatic)
1.12 (World of Color Update)
1.11 (Exploration Update)
1.10 (Frostburn Update)
1.9 (Combat Update) | ✔️ | | 1.8 (Bountiful Update)
1.7 (Update That Changed The World) | ✔️ | | 1.4 (Pretty Scary Update) | Maybe? Idk | | Bedrock Edition
The original pack | [Here](https://mcpedl.com/raya-16x/)
--- # Differences from the original Bedrock pack - Recreated all the GUIs (mostly) from scratch - Used the transparent GUIs as the base, courtesy of Vanilla Tweaks - Removed all the following custom textures to avoid texture inconsistency, especially post-1.14 - Teracotta - Wood Planks - Crafting Table - Cobblestone - Added ore borders for the coal and copper ores, courtesy of Vanilla Tweaks - Added deepslate variant for all ores - Added netherite variant for tools and armors based on the diamond variant - Added hardcore heart variant for the custom heart texture - Changed the attack indicator icons to fit the theme - Added the custom night sky, which is visible if you use either [OptiFine](https://optifine.net), [FabricSkyBoxes (now called Nuit)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nuit) or [Optiboxes (now called Skyboxify)](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify) ## Additional Notes - For versions prior to 1.21.3, due to bug [MC-165182](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-165182), translucency are not allowed on most GUIs, which causes them to become opaque instead --- **Credits / Penghargaan**
| Credits / Penghargaan | Contributor / Penyumbang | | :--- | :--- | | Original Bedrock Pack | PrestigePlayz | | Java Port | Muhammad Nuruddin (NuruddinPlays) | ---
